Flavor: They arrive before the soldiers. Usually that's enough.
What they're retrieving is rarely discussed.
The Korad assimilated everything about them except the part that matters.
They protected the silos before they protected anything else.
Three shifts. No exceptions. Ask them why and they'll tell you about the last time someone skipped a shift.
Not soldiers by trade. Farmers by trade. The distinction stops mattering fast.
They know every road, every shortcut, every place a column of troops could disappear.
They've been fighting over water since before anyone was keeping score.
The lakes have rules. They enforce them.
The scholars needed protection. Nobody expected the protection to get this good at it.
Built for the water. Functional everywhere else.
No banner. No fixed address. No problem.

column5: and extremely hard to pin down.

Flavor: Named after a ship. The ship's crew would be flattered and concerned.
They were out here before the factions drew their lines. They'll be here after.
